metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace backing Microsoft Sentinel.

properties.displayName: Banana RAT - PowerShell C2 Payload Retrieval (SHADOW-WATER-063)
properties.description: Detects PowerShell download cradles fetching Banana RAT staging payloads (st.txt / payload.php) from SHADOW-WATER-063 C2 infrastructure targeting financial institutions. Sub-techniques: T1059.001, T1105. Source: CYBERXTRON advisory 2026-05-21; IOCs GTI-confirmed malicious.
properties.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("24.199.90.58", "162.141.111.227", "windowsk-cdn.com", "/payload.php", "/st.txt")
| extend AdvisoryName = "Banana RAT - SHADOW-WATER-063", ThreatActor = "SHADOW-WATER-063"
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, AdvisoryName, ThreatActor, ReportId

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: Banana RAT PowerShell C2 retrieval on {{DeviceName}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Detects PowerShell download cradles fetching Banana RAT staging payloads (st.txt / payload.php) from SHADOW-WATER-063 C2 infrastructure targeting financial institutions. Sub-techniques: T1059.001, T1105. Source: CYBERXTRON advisory 2026-05-21; IOCs GTI-confirmed malicious.
